collectors.usage: An identity-resolution company designed to connect online activity to offline / real-world identity.
A demand-side ad platform designed to build a cross-site/cross-device identity for ad bidding.
An ad-tech company designed to track products you view across sites and retarget you with ads.
A data-management platform designed to segment audiences across sites.
A programmatic ad exchange designed to sync identifiers and trade ad impressions in real time.
Designed to personalize and measure ads across the web using a cross-site advertising ID.
Designed to measure site traffic and your on-site behavior for the website owner.
Designed to retarget you with ads based on shopping and browsing signals.
Designed to target and measure advertising, typically using a cross-site identifier.
Designed to target and measure advertising, typically using a cross-site identifier.
Designed to target and measure advertising, typically using a cross-site identifier.
Designed to track what content you read and recommend (paid) content across publishers.
Designed to measure your behavior on the site.
Designed to measure your behavior on the site.

rollup.label: Linkage to your real identity / email

risk.verdict: Very heavy tracking. Your visit is shared widely for ads & profiling.

factors.label: Third-party trackers contacted
factors.detail: 22 known tracking domains loaded resources on this page.

factors.label: Advertising & data-broker cookies
factors.detail: 70 cookies used to target ads or sell audience data.

factors.label: Number of companies receiving data
factors.detail: 22 separate companies can associate this visit with you.

factors.label: Long-lived tracking cookies
factors.detail: 24 tracking cookies persist for more than 6 months.

factors.label: Cookies missing the Secure flag
factors.detail: 22 cookies could be sent over an unencrypted connection.

factors.label: Analytics cookies
factors.detail: 4 cookies measuring your behavior on the site.

factors.label: Unrecognized third-party connections
factors.detail: 29 other third-party domains were contacted but aren't in our known list — unverified, worth a look.
